en: Therefore be imitators of God, as beloved children.
zh: 因此，你們既然是蒙愛的兒女，就應當效法 神。

en: And walk in love, as Christ loved us and gave himself up for us, a fragrant offering and sacrifice to God.
zh: 要憑著愛心行事，好像基督愛我們，為我們捨己，當作馨香的供品和祭物獻給 神。

en: But sexual immorality and all impurity or covetousness must not even be named among you, as is proper among saints.
zh: 至於淫亂和任何污穢或貪心的事，在你們中間連提都不可提，才合聖徒的體統。

en: Let there be no filthiness nor foolish talk nor crude joking, which are out of place, but instead let there be thanksgiving.
zh: 更不要講淫穢和愚妄的話，或下流的笑話，這些都與你們不相稱；卻要說感謝的話。

en: For you may be sure of this, that everyone who is sexually immoral or impure, or who is covetous (that is, an idolater), has no inheritance in the kingdom of Christ and God.
zh: 因為你們確實知道，無論是淫亂的、污穢的或貪心的 ，都得不到在基督和 神的國裡的基業。

en: Let no one deceive you with empty words, for because of these things the wrath of God comes upon the sons of disobedience.
zh: 不要給別人用空言欺騙了你們，正因為這些事， 神的震怒必定臨到那些悖逆的人。

en: Therefore do not associate with them;
zh: 所以，不要與他們同流合污。

en: for at one time you were darkness, but now you are light in the Lord. Walk as children of light
zh: 你們從前是黑暗的，現今在主裡卻是光明的，行事為人就應當像光明的兒女。

en: (for the fruit of light is found in all that is good and right and true),
zh: 光明所結的果子，就是一切良善、公義、誠實。

en: and try to discern what is pleasing to the Lord.
zh: 你們要察驗甚麼是主所喜悅的。

en: Take no part in the unfruitful works of darkness, but instead expose them.
zh: 不要參與暗昧無益的事，倒要把它揭露出來，

en: For it is shameful even to speak of the things that they do in secret.
zh: 因為他們暗中所作的事，連提起來也是羞恥的。

en: But when anything is exposed by the light, it becomes visible,
zh: 凡被光揭露的，都是顯而易見的。

en: for anything that becomes visible is light. Therefore it says, "Awake, O sleeper, and arise from the dead, and Christ will shine on you."
zh: 因為一切顯露出來的就是光，所以有話說： “睡了的人哪，醒過來， 從死人中起來吧！ 基督必要照亮你。”

en: Look carefully then how you walk, not as unwise but as wise,
zh: 所以，你們行事為人要謹慎，不要像愚昧人，卻要像聰明人。

en: making the best use of the time, because the days are evil.
zh: 要把握時機，因為這時代邪惡。

en: Therefore do not be foolish, but understand what the will of the Lord is.
zh: 因此，不要作糊塗人，要明白甚麼是主的旨意。

en: And do not get drunk with wine, for that is debauchery, but be filled with the Spirit,
zh: 不要醉酒，醉酒能使人放蕩亂性，卻要讓聖靈充滿。

en: addressing one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing and making melody to the Lord with all your heart,
zh: 應當用詩章、聖詩、靈歌，彼此呼應，口唱心和地讚美主。

en: giving thanks always and for everything to God the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ,
zh: 凡事要奉我們主耶穌基督的名，常常感謝父 神，

en: submitting to one another out of reverence for Christ.
zh: 還要存敬畏基督的心，彼此順服。

en: Wives, submit to your own husbands, as to the Lord.
zh: 你們作妻子的，要順服自己的丈夫，好像順服主一樣，

en: For the husband is the head of the wife even as Christ is the head of the church, his body, and is himself its Savior.
zh: 因為丈夫是妻子的頭，好像基督是教會的頭；基督又是教會全體的救主。

en: Now as the church submits to Christ, so also wives should submit in everything to their husbands.
zh: 教會怎樣順服基督，妻子也要照樣凡事順服丈夫。

en: Husbands, love your wives, as Christ loved the church and gave himself up for her,
zh: 你們作丈夫的，要愛妻子，好像基督愛教會，為教會捨己，

en: that he might sanctify her, having cleansed her by the washing of water with the word,
zh: 為的是要用水藉著道把教會洗淨，成為聖潔，

en: so that he might present the church to himself in splendor, without spot or wrinkle or any such thing, that she might be holy and without blemish.
zh: 可以作榮耀的教會歸給自己，甚麼污點皺紋等也沒有，而是聖潔沒有瑕疵的。

en: In the same way husbands should love their wives as their own bodies. He who loves his wife loves himself.
zh: 丈夫也應當這樣愛妻子，好像愛自己的身體一樣。愛妻子的，就是愛自己了。

en: For no one ever hated his own flesh, but nourishes and cherishes it, just as Christ does the church,
zh: 從來沒有人恨惡自己的身體，總是保養顧惜，好像基督對教會一樣，

en: because we are members of his body.
zh: 因為我們是他身上的肢體。

en: "Therefore a man shall leave his father and mother and hold fast to his wife, and the two shall become one flesh."
zh: 為了這緣故，人要離開父母，與妻子結合，二人成為一體。

en: This mystery is profound, and I am saying that it refers to Christ and the church.
zh: 這是極大的奧祕，但我是指著基督和教會說的。

en: However, let each one of you love his wife as himself, and let the wife see that she respects her husband.
zh: 無論怎樣，你們各人都要愛自己的妻子，好像愛自己一樣。妻子也應當敬重丈夫。
